languages.text: "...я решил сохранить его как память после того, как мое вмешательство в структуру гробницы нарушило стазис и привело к пробуждению и заражению обитателей скверной Лланду'гора. Разумеется, у меня были причины — устроить западню для обокравшего меня вора... впрочем, я увековечил династию, поместив посох в свой Музеон. Достаточное извинение за мою оплошность".

traits.locale_text: "Посох лорда Йер'Менгх. Я решил сохранить его как память после того, как мое вмешательство в структуру его гробницы нарушило стазис и привело к пробуждению и заражению обитателей скверной Лланду'гора. Разумеется, у меня были причины — устроить западню для обокравшего меня вора... впрочем, я увековечил ту ветвь династии, поместим ее экспонаты в свой Музеон. Достаточное извинение за мою оплошность".

languages.text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."
languages.original_text: "...я решил сохранить его как память после того, как мое вмешательство в структуру гробницы нарушило стазис и привело к пробуждению и заражению обитателей скверной Лланду'гора. Разумеется, у меня были причины — устроить западню для обокравшего меня вора... впрочем, я увековечил династию, поместив посох в свой Музеон. Достаточное извинение за мою оплошность".

traits.locale_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. Sufficient apology for my oversight."

"...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

"The staff of Lord Yer'Menkh. I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of his tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised that branch of the dynasty and will place its exhibits in my Museion. Sufficient apology for my oversight."

"...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. Sufficient apology for my oversight."

"...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

languages.text: “……我篡改了墓穴的结构，破坏了静滞力场，导致墓中住民苏醒并感染了兰杜戈尔的瘟疫。在这之后，我决定把权杖留作纪念。当然，我的行为自有道理——我想给那个偷走我藏品的小偷设下陷阱……不过，我将权杖放置在陈列馆中，也让那个王朝得以万古长存。这补偿已足够弥补我的疏忽了。”
languages.original_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

traits.locale_text: “……我篡改了墓穴的结构，破坏了静滞力场，导致墓中住民苏醒并感染了兰杜戈尔的瘟疫。在这之后，我决定把权杖留作纪念。当然，我的行为自有道理——我想给那个偷走我藏品的小偷设下陷阱……不过，我将权杖放置在陈列馆中，也让那个王朝得以万古长存。这补偿已足够弥补我的疏忽了。”

languages.text: «... decidí conservarlo como recuerdo después de que, al manipular la estructura de la tumba, rompiera la suspensión e hiciera que sus habitantes despertaran y se contagiaran de la corrupción de Llandu'gor. Tenía mis motivos para lo que hice: quería tender una trampa al ladrón que me había robado... pero he inmortalizado la dinastía colocando su báculo en mi Museion. Es una disculpa suficiente por mi descuido».
languages.original_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

traits.locale_text: «... decidí conservarlo como recuerdo después de que, al manipular la estructura de la tumba, rompiera la suspensión e hiciera que sus habitantes despertaran y se contagiaran de la corrupción de Llandu'gor. Tenía mis motivos para lo que hice: quería tender una trampa al ladrón que me había robado... pero he inmortalizado la dinastía colocando su báculo en mi Museion. Es una disculpa suficiente por mi descuido».

languages.text: J'ai décidé de le garder en souvenir après que mes agissements ont affaibli la structure de la tombe et entraîné la rupture de la stase, provoquant le réveil de ses habitants, qui se sont alors retrouvés infectés par la malédiction de Llandu'gor. Bien entendu, mes actions n'étaient pas sans motif. Je cherchais à piéger le voleur qui s'en était pris à moi... Mais j'ai immortalisé cette dynastie en plaçant le bâton dans mon Muséion. Des excuses suffisantes pour ma négligence. »
languages.original_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

traits.locale_text: J'ai décidé de le garder en souvenir après que mes agissements ont affaibli la structure de la tombe et entraîné la rupture de la stase, provoquant le réveil de ses habitants, qui se sont alors retrouvés infectés par la malédiction de Llandu'gor. Bien entendu, mes actions n'étaient pas sans motif. Je cherchais à piéger le voleur qui s'en était pris à moi... Mais j'ai immortalisé cette dynastie en plaçant le bâton dans mon Muséion. Des excuses suffisantes pour ma négligence. »

languages.text: "Mezarın yapısıyla oynamam, stazı bozup sakinlerin uyanmasına ve Llandu'gor'un vebasını kapmasına neden olduktan sonra onu hatıra olarak saklamaya karar verdim. Elbette eylemlerimin bir sebebi vardı. Beni soyan hırsıza tuzak kurmak istemiştim... Ancak hanedanlığın o kolunu ölümsüzleştirdim. Eserlerini de Museion'uma yerleştireceğim. Gözden kaçırdığım şey için yeterli bir özür."
languages.original_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

traits.locale_text: "Mezarın yapısıyla oynamam, stazı bozup sakinlerin uyanmasına ve Llandu'gor'un vebasını kapmasına neden olduktan sonra onu hatıra olarak saklamaya karar verdim. Elbette eylemlerimin bir sebebi vardı. Beni soyan hırsıza tuzak kurmak istemiştim... Ancak hanedanlığın o kolunu ölümsüzleştirdim. Eserlerini de Museion'uma yerleştireceğim. Gözden kaçırdığım şey için yeterli bir özür."

languages.text: " ... Ich beschloss, ihn als Andenken zu behalten, als meine Manipulation der Struktur des Grabes die Stase aufhob und die erwachten Bewohner sich mit der Pest von Lland'gor infizierten. Ich hatte natürlich Gründe für mein Tun — eigentlich wollte ich dem Dieb, der mich bestohlen hatte, eine Falle stellen, aber ich machte die Dynastie unsterblich, indem ich den Stab in mein Museion aufnahm. Eine hinreichende Entschuldigung für meinen Lapsus."
languages.original_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

traits.locale_text: " ... Ich beschloss, ihn als Andenken zu behalten, als meine Manipulation der Struktur des Grabes die Stase aufhob und die erwachten Bewohner sich mit der Pest von Lland'gor infizierten. Ich hatte natürlich Gründe für mein Tun — eigentlich wollte ich dem Dieb, der mich bestohlen hatte, eine Falle stellen, aber ich machte die Dynastie unsterblich, indem ich den Stab in mein Museion aufnahm. Eine hinreichende Entschuldigung für meinen Lapsus."

languages.text: 「…私は、墓の構造を改変して停滞を解き、住人たちが目覚め、ランドゥゴールの疫病に感染したことを後悔し、その記念として残しました。もちろん、私の行動には理由がありました。盗まれた財宝を取り戻すための罠を仕掛けたかったのです…しかし、私は自分の博物館に杖を置いたことで、その王朝を永遠に生き残らせました。私の過失に対する十分な謝罪です。」
languages.original_text: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."

traits.locale_text: 「…私は、墓の構造を改変して停滞を解き、住人たちが目覚め、ランドゥゴールの疫病に感染したことを後悔し、その記念として残しました。もちろん、私の行動には理由がありました。盗まれた財宝を取り戻すための罠を仕掛けたかったのです…しかし、私は自分の博物館に杖を置いたことで、その王朝を永遠に生き残らせました。私の過失に対する十分な謝罪です。」
